intro: Hieracium ochroleucopsis, also known as yellow hawkweed or white hawkweed, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Hieracium ochroleucopsis include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant include tinctures, infusions, and dried herb extracts, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
